name: Iron Gloves of Thor
description: The Iron Gloves of Thor, known as Járngreipr in Old Norse, are an essential part of the thunder god's arsenal. These gloves are not merely protective gear; they are absolutely crucial for wielding his mighty hammer, Mjolnir. Without them, Thor cannot properly grip the hammer's handle and channel its immense power. The gloves are forged from iron, though their exact creation is not explicitly detailed in the primary sources. It is implied they were crafted by dwarven smiths, renowned for their skill in creating magical artifacts for the gods. The Iron Gloves amplify Thor's already formidable strength, allowing him to control Mjolnir's destructive force and prevent it from shattering upon impact. They represent control, stability, and the responsible application of immense power. While Mjolnir is the symbol of Thor's might, the Iron Gloves are the key to unlocking and directing that power safely and effectively. They are a testament to the importance of restraint and preparation even for a god as powerful as Thor. Their significance lies not just in their practical function, but also in their symbolic representation of Thor's mastery over his own strength and the destructive potential of Mjolnir. They are always mentioned alongside Mjolnir and Megingjörð (Thor's belt of strength) as essential components of his divine equipment. They ensure that when Thor strikes, he strikes with focused and controlled power, protecting both himself and the realms he defends.
subtitle: Essential for wielding Mjolnir's power.

keyMyths.title: Thor's Gear
keyMyths.description: The Iron Gloves are always mentioned alongside Mjolnir and Megingjörð as vital tools for Thor's tasks. They enable him to wield Mjolnir safely and effectively.

keyMyths.title: Control and Power
keyMyths.description: The gloves represent the need for control and responsibility when wielding great power, even for a god. They showcase Thor's mastery of his own strength.

sources.author: Snorri Sturluson
sources.description: Provides descriptions of Thor and his equipment, including the Iron Gloves.
sources.text: Provides descriptions of Thor and his equipment, including the Iron Gloves.

sources.author: Various
sources.description: References Thor's equipment in various poems and stories.
